calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Chris F. Chan, As A Judgment Debytor
Off Calendar Feb-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WARREN NGUYEN, TEL. NO. (408) 292-4623 APPEARING FOR CHRIS CHAN;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT COLLECTION BUREAU's Motion To Amend Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Chris F. Chan, As A Judgment Debtor IS Denied. The judgment creditor failed to show by a preponderance of the evidence that Chris Chan controlled the underlying litigation. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
